TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kawbu' = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Kawbu'. 31 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 110 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 85% niqan 93 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 15% niqan 17 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal76%, Amis6%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = kawbu' = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ kawbu'. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Kawbu' = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Kawbu'. 31 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 110 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 85% niqan 93 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 15% niqan 17 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal76%, Amis6%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = kawbu' = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ kawbu'. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
